steps.title: Fastest path: try the choices
steps.content: Because the choices give possible solutions, plug them into the equation instead of solving from scratch. The only choice that satisfies the equation is A, $-1$.

steps.title: Combine constants first
steps.content: $(p+3)+8$ is the same as $p+11$, so the equation becomes $$p+11=10$$

steps.title: Check the choices
steps.content: The correct answer is $-1$, which is the solution. The positive choices do not work because adding $11$ to any of them gives a value greater than $10$.
